info.title: Simple LLM Service
info.description: LLM text and structured-data generation service. Supports multiple providers (OpenRouter, Ollama, etc.) and both plain text (gen_text) and structured JSON output (gen_dict) via string-schema.

post.summary: Generate text or structured data with an LLM
post.description: Call an LLM to generate a response. For plain text output, omit 'schema' and 'response_format'. For structured JSON output (gen_dict), provide a 'schema' string in string-schema format (e.g. 'title:str, score:int, tags:[str]'). The response for gen_text is a JSON-encoded string; for gen_dict it is {data: {...}, response_meta: {...}}. Use 'tag' to label calls for logging/analytics.

prompt.description: The prompt / instruction to send to the LLM

model.description: Model identifier (e.g. 'google/gemini-2.0-flash-exp:free', 'ollama/llama3', 'gpt-4o'). Defaults to the service's configured default model.

schema.description: String-schema definition for structured output (gen_dict mode). Example: 'title:str, score:int(0-10), tags:[str]'. When provided, response is a structured JSON object matching this schema.

response_format.description: Explicit response format override. Usually inferred from presence of 'schema'.

mode.description: Structured output mode: 'auto' picks best for provider, 'json' uses JSON mode, 'tools' uses function calling.

tag.description: Optional label for this call, used for grouping in logs and analytics.

GenerateResponse.description: For gen_text: the response IS the JSON-encoded string directly. For gen_dict: {data: <object>, response_meta: {model, tokens_in, tokens_out, duration_ms}}

data.description: Structured output object (only present in gen_dict mode, matches provided schema)

response_meta.description: Token usage and model metadata (only present in gen_dict mode)
